verses.7: Therefore this is what the LORD of Hosts says:
verses.12: Who is the man wise enough to understand this?To whom has the mouth of the LORD spoken, that he may explain it?Why is the land destroyed and scorched like a desert, so no one can pass through it?
verses.13: And the LORD answered, “It is because they have forsaken My law, which I set before them; they have not walked in it or obeyed My voice.
verses.14: Instead, they have followed the stubbornness of their hearts and gone after the Baals, as their fathers taught them.”
verses.15: Therefore this is what the LORD of Hosts, the God of Israel, says: “Behold, I will feed this people wormwood and give them poisoned water to drink.
verses.16: I will scatter them among the nations that neither they nor their fathers have known, and I will send a sword after them until I have finished them off.”
verses.17: This is what the LORD of Hosts says:
verses.22: Declare that this is what the LORD says:
verses.23: This is what the LORD says:
verses.25: “Behold, the days are coming,” declares the LORD, “when I will punish all who are circumcised only in the flesh—
verses.26: Egypt, Judah, Edom, Ammon, Moab, and all the inhabitants of the desert who clip the hair of their temples. For all these nations are uncircumcised, and the whole house of Israel is uncircumcised in heart.”
